announcement_title: AeroVironment Announces Fiscal 2025 First Quarter Results
announcement_text_excerpt: AeroVironment reported it was awarded a U.S. Army Lethal Unmanned Systems IDIQ with a record contract ceiling value of $990 million and initial funding of $128 million. Linked to delivery order W91CRB24F0412 for Switchblade all-up rounds, fire control systems, and chargers.
link_notes: IR release provides explicit 4:10 PM EDT timestamp and confirms initial funding close to the USAspending $128.0M delivery-order obligation. Contract number is linked through the government award row rather than named in the release.

announcement_title: AV Announces Second Delivery Order on $990 Million Contract with U.S. Army
announcement_text_excerpt: AeroVironment announced a second delivery order totaling $55.3 million for Switchblade loitering munition systems under the U.S. Army $990 million IDIQ. Linked to delivery order W91CRB25F0067.
link_notes: Company IR release has explicit 4:10 PM EST timestamp and amount matches the USAspending $55.5M obligation closely.

announcement_title: AV Secures $288 Million Delivery Order on $990 Million Contract with U.S. Army
announcement_text_excerpt: AeroVironment announced its third delivery order totaling $288 million for Switchblade loitering munition systems under the U.S. Army Lethal Unmanned Systems contract. Linked to delivery order W91CRB25F0094.
link_notes: Company IR release has explicit 5:00 PM EST timestamp. USAspending current obligation snapshot is $218.1M after later actions, so original public award amount should be preserved separately before modeling.

announcement_title: BlackSky Wins Competitive $24 Million Air Force Research Laboratory Contract for Global Moving Target Engagement
announcement_text_excerpt: Nasdaq-hosted Business Wire release published Mar. 13, 2024 at 8:30 AM EDT states BlackSky won a competitive $24 million Air Force Research Laboratory ceiling contract and that an initial award of $3.5 million was obligated at the time of award. Linked to USAspending award FA945324C0001.
link_notes: Exact market-public timestamp verified from Nasdaq/Business Wire mirror. Keep ceiling and initial obligated amount separate before modeling.

announcement_text_excerpt: DoD announced CACI Inc. - Federal was awarded a $146.410 million task order HS002123F0020 under IDIQ HS002123D0002 for Defense Counterintelligence and Security Agency background investigation fieldwork services, with $146.410 million obligated at award.
link_notes: Official DoD announcement is public and exact for the initial task order, but current USAspending obligation snapshot is $652.4M; keep below link gate pending amount snapshot correction.
validation_notes: link_confidence_below_0_80

announcement_text_excerpt: DoD announced Huntington Ingalls Industries' Newport News Shipbuilding Division was awarded a $2.994 billion contract for USS John C. Stennis refueling complex overhaul, with $1.048 billion obligated at time of award. Contracting activity N00024-21-C-2106 maps to USAspending N0002421C2106.
link_notes: Official DoD daily contract page is treated as a 5 PM ET market-public announcement. Current USAspending obligation snapshot is $3.37B, above the initial public award, so amount snapshot needs reconciliation.

announcement_text_excerpt: DoD update stated the Aug. 2023 contract announcements for General Dynamics Bath Iron Works N00024-23-C-2305 and Huntington Ingalls Ingalls Shipbuilding N00024-23-C-2307 did not include funding amounts and later disclosed 10 DDG 51 ships totaling $14.581 billion across both firms.
link_notes: Official source links the contract but public economics are combined across GD and HII and the initial award lacked funding amounts; not model eligible.
validation_notes: announcement_text_does_not_match_amount_agency_or_program;link_confidence_below_0_80

announcement_title: Naval Air Systems Command Awards Kratos Sole Source $49.6 Million Initial Contract for Full Rate Production (Lot 4) of the BQM-177A Subsonic Aerial Target System
announcement_text_excerpt: GlobeNewswire release at Feb. 23, 2023 16:15 ET says Kratos received a $49.568 million Full Rate Production Lot 4 contract from the U.S. Navy for the BQM-177A Subsonic Aerial Target. Linked to USAspending/NAVAIR contract N0001923C0021.
link_notes: Exact market-public timestamp verified from GlobeNewswire; link is to the public company release and the award amount/program match the government row.

announcement_text_excerpt: DoD announced Kratos Unmanned Aerial Systems was awarded a $15.515 million contract to procure and deliver two XQ-58A unmanned aerial systems for experimentation support. Contracting activity N00421-23-C-0010 maps to USAspending N0042123C0010.
link_notes: Official DoD timestamp is usable, but the USAspending row aggregates later obligations to $83.5M, materially different from the initial public award.
validation_notes: link_confidence_below_0_80

announcement_title: NASA Awards Intuitive Machines Near Space Network Contract with a Maximum Potential Value of $4.82 Billion
announcement_text_excerpt: Intuitive Machines filed an 8-K stating NASA awarded the company a Near Space Network contract with maximum potential value of $4.82 billion and initial incrementally funded task orders totaling $150 million. Linked to USAspending contract 80GSFC24CA018 for Near Space Network services.
link_notes: SEC 8-K gives market-public timestamp and distinguishes $4.82B ceiling from $150M initial funded task orders. USAspending row currently carries $27.0M obligation and needs source-snapshot reconciliation.

announcement_title: Intuitive Machines Strengthens Lunar Service Capabilities with $116.9 million NASA Lunar Contract Award
announcement_text_excerpt: Intuitive Machines announced NASA awarded a $116.9 million Commercial Lunar Payload Services contract to deliver science and technology payloads to the Moon's South Pole. Linked to USAspending CLPS delivery order 80JSC024F0079 for Intuitive Machines.
link_notes: Market-public company IR release with explicit 4:21 PM EDT timestamp. Public award amount is $116.9M while current USAspending obligation snapshot is $88.0M, so amount feature should be refreshed before modeling.

announcement_title: Planet Reports Financial Results for Third Quarter of Fiscal Year 2025
announcement_text_excerpt: Planet disclosed that on November 25, 2024 it received a NASA Commercial SmallSat Data Acquisition order valued at approximately $19.95 million for a one-year period of performance. Linked to delivery order 80HQTR25FA012.
link_notes: SEC-hosted earnings exhibit has market-public timestamp from release distribution. This row lacks market-cap materiality in the current enriched corpus and should remain ineligible until context is filled.
validation_notes: missing_market_cap_materiality_ratio

announcement_title: Redwire Corporation Awarded $45 Million Contract from Air Force Research Laboratory to Advance Enhanced Space-Based Capabilities for the Warfighter
announcement_text_excerpt: StreetInsider timestamped the Redwire release at Dec. 10, 2024 7:32 AM EST. The release says Redwire was awarded a $45.4696 million Air Force Research Laboratory contract for prototype software and hardware for mission critical technologies. Linked to LoadPath USAspending contract FA945324CX039 with a $15.4 million current obligation snapshot.
link_notes: Public company announcement occurred after the government award date; include as a cautious link because LoadPath is mapped to Redwire and the economics/program match, but first-public-awareness should be rechecked against DoD/Defense Daily before modeling.

announcement_title: U.S. Space Force Awards Rocket Lab Launch Contract for Space Test Program (STP)-S30
announcement_text_excerpt: Nasdaq-hosted Business Wire release published Apr. 8, 2024 at 6:30 PM EDT states Rocket Lab was awarded a $14.49 million task order by the U.S. Space Force to launch the Space Test Program-30 mission from Launch Complex 2. Linked to USAspending award FA881824FB016.
link_notes: Exact market-public timestamp verified from Nasdaq/Business Wire mirror; amount and mission match the government row.
